#nullable enable

#pragma warning disable CS1570 // XML comment has badly formed XML

namespace OpenTelemetry.SemanticConventions;

/// <summary>
/// Typed factory extensions for OpenTelemetry semantic-convention metric instruments.
/// Each method creates an instrument with the registry-defined name, unit, and description.
/// </summary>
static partial class HttpServerMeters
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Duration of HTTP server requests.
    /// </summary>
    public static global::System.Diagnostics.Metrics.Histogram<double> CreateHttpServerRequestDurationHistogram(
        this global::System.Diagnostics.Metrics.Meter meter)
        => meter.CreateHistogram<double>(
            name: "http.server.request.duration",
            unit: "s",
            description: "Duration of HTTP server requests.");
}
